data.name: AlwaysAdminEnabledSettingsItemContent
data.value: Control whether to run software as admin everytime on startup

data.name: AlwaysAdminEnabledSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Run Software As Admin

data.name: AlwaysAdminEnabledToggleButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to toggle the always run software as admin feature on / off

data.name: BrowserPathComboBoxHint
data.value: Select a Chromium-based browser

data.name: BrowserPathComboBoxToolTip
data.value: Click to select a browser path

data.name: BrowserPathSettingsItemContent
data.value: Select a browser path used for browser cealing (exe extension)

data.name: BrowserPathSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Browser Path

data.name: ClashConfButtonName
data.value: Edit

data.name: ClashConfButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to edit the additional Clash conf

data.name: ClashConfSettingsItemContent
data.value: Edit the additional config in config.yaml used for global cealing. Detailed instructions refer to Clash Meta docs (Optional)

data.name: ClashConfSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Clash Conf

data.name: ExtraArgsSettingsItemContent
data.value: Add the additional Chromium startup args used for browser cealing (Separated by spaces)

data.name: ExtraArgsSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Browser Args

data.name: ExtraArgsTextBoxHint
data.value: Extra startup args (Optional)

data.name: ExtraArgsTextBoxToolTip
data.value: Click to add the additional browser startup args

data.name: HostsConfButtonName
data.value: Edit

data.name: HostsConfButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to edit the Hosts conf

data.name: HostsConfSettingsItemContent
data.value: Edit the system Hosts used for local DNS resolution (Taking effect upon saving)

data.name: HostsConfSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Hosts Conf

data.name: KeepRunningEnabledSettingsItemContent
data.value: Control whether to keep program running after starting browser cealing (The browser may fail to launch if this option is disabled)

data.name: KeepRunningEnabledSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Keep Program Running

data.name: KeepRunningEnabledToggleButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to toggle the keep program running behavior on / off

data.name: LangOptionComboBoxHint
data.value: Select a UI l10n language

data.name: LangOptionComboBoxToolTip
data.value: Click to select a l10n language

data.name: LangOptionSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Lang L10n

data.name: NginxConfButtonName
data.value: Edit

data.name: NginxConfButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to edit the additional Nginx conf

data.name: NginxConfSettingsItemContent
data.value: Edit the additional config in nginx.conf used for global cealing. Detailed instructions refer to Nginx docs (Optional)

data.name: NginxConfSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Nginx Conf

data.name: SpeedMonitorEnabledSettingsItemContent
data.value: Control whether to enable the traffic speed monitor feature

data.name: SpeedMonitorEnabledSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Traffic Speed Monitor

data.name: SpeedMonitorEnabledToggleButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to toggle the traffic speed monitor feature on / off

data.name: ThemeColorComboBoxHint
data.value: Select a UI color flavor

data.name: ThemeColorComboBoxToolTip
data.value: Click to select a flavor color

data.name: ThemeColorSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Flavor Color

data.name: ThemeStateComboBoxHint
data.value: Select a UI theme state

data.name: ThemeStateComboBoxToolTip
data.value: Click to select a theme state

data.name: ThemeStateSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Theme State

data.name: UpdateHostEnabledSettingsItemContent
data.value: Control whether to check host for update automatically on startup

data.name: UpdateHostEnabledSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Check Host For Update

data.name: UpdateHostEnabledToggleButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to toggle the auto check host for update feature on / off

data.name: UpdateSoftwareEnabledSettingsItemContent
data.value: Control whether to check software for update automatically on startup

data.name: UpdateSoftwareEnabledSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Check Software For Update

data.name: UpdateSoftwareEnabledToggleButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to toggle the auto check software for update feature on / off

data.name: UpstreamMirrorEnabledSettingsItemContent
data.value: Control whether to use mirror to update automatically if host update fails (Only available for Github or Gitlab host source)

data.name: UpstreamMirrorEnabledSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Select Host Source Mirror

data.name: UpstreamMirrorEnabledToggleButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to toggle the auto select host source mirror feature on / off

data.name: UpstreamUrlSettingsItemContent
data.value: Edit the upstream host source link used for host update (using built-in host by default)

data.name: UpstreamUrlSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Host Source

data.name: UpstreamUrlTextBoxToolTip
data.value: Click to edit the upstream host updating source

data.name: _BrowserPathExtensionInvalidValidationContent
data.value: File extention invalid

data.name: _BrowserPathFileInvalidValidationContent
data.value: File not found

data.name: _ExtraArgsInvalidValidationContent
data.value: Args format invalid

data.name: _UpstreamUrlInvalidValidationContent
data.value: Url format invalid

data.name: ClashHostsEnabledSettingsItemTitle
data.value: Wildcard Domain Cealing

data.name: ClashHostsEnabledSettingsItemContent
data.value: Control whether to use Clash instead of Hosts to enable wildcard domain matching on global cealing (Global cealing will not match any subdomain other than www for rules beginning with a wildcard if this option is disabled)

data.name: ClashHostsEnabledToggleButtonToolTip
data.value: Click to toggle the wildcard domain cealing feature on / off
